summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0/P1 MVP: AI Offers + Extra Works Draft Flow. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing of Extra Work Modal, AI Proposal, Draft Panel, Create Offer from Drafts, and AI Assist in Offer Editor all working correctly.

minor.issue: ВиК keyword not matched directly due to case-sensitivity in ACTIVITY_KNOWLEDGE dict keys - only works via synonyms like 'водопров'

issues: HTML structure warnings: <span> elements inside <tr>/<tbody>/<th>/<td> causing React hydration warnings (not affecting functionality)

action_items: MINOR: Add lowercase 'вик' key to ACTIVITY_KNOWLEDGE dict for direct matching (currently only works via synonyms)
MINOR: Fix HTML structure in OfferEditorPage.js to avoid <span> inside table elements warnings
critical_code_review_comments: AI Proposal service is RULE-BASED (MOCKED - no external API calls) using ACTIVITY_KNOWLEDGE dictionary in extra_works.py
Code is well-structured with proper Pydantic models for validation
Extra work drafts properly transition from 'draft' to 'converted' status after offer creation
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed drafts during backend testing (cleaned up). Frontend created 1 draft 'Тест боядисване стена' and 1 offer from drafts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extra Works MVP fully tested. Project PRJ-001 (c3529276-8c03-49b3-92de-51216aab25da) now has 10 extra work drafts and at least 2 offers created from drafts. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_extra_works.py covers: draft CRUD, AI proposal for мазилка/боядисване/плочки/гипсокартон/електро/ВиК keywords, small qty adjustment, apply AI to draft, create offer from drafts, status transitions.

extra_work_draft_crud.notes: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE all working. Status, location fields, AI data properly stored.

ai_proposal_service.notes: Rule-based matching for 6 keywords (мазилка, боядисване, плочки, гипсокартон, електро, ВиК via synonyms). Returns pricing, materials, related_smr, confidence.

small_qty_adjustment.notes: Prices increased by multiplier when qty below threshold (e.g., +35% for мазилка under 5 m2)

apply_ai_to_draft.notes: POST /api/extra-works/{id}/apply-ai updates draft with AI pricing and materials data

create_offer_from_drafts.notes: POST /api/extra-works/create-offer creates offer with lines, changes draft status to 'converted'

frontend_extra_work_modal.notes: Modal opens from 'Допълнително СМР' button. Form has title, unit, qty, location (floor/room/zone), notes fields.

frontend_ai_proposal_display.notes: Shows: Recognition (type/subtype), Pricing (material/labor/total with small qty %), Related SMR badges, Materials checklist (expandable)

frontend_draft_panel.notes: Shows draft rows with checkboxes, AI badge, prices. 'Създай оферта' button appears when drafts selected.

frontend_create_offer_flow.notes: Selecting drafts and clicking 'Създай оферта' creates offer and navigates to offer editor

frontend_ai_assist_offer_editor.notes: 'AI помощ' button opens dialog. Can enter description, get AI proposal, add line with suggested prices.

mocked_apis.note: AI Proposal service is RULE-BASED (no external LLM calls)
mocked_apis.implementation: Uses ACTIVITY_KNOWLEDGE dict in /app/backend/app/routes/extra_works.py with keyword matching and synonym support
